capabilities.name: Project Planning
capabilities.summary: Turns a project idea into staged implementation tasks with acceptance criteria before any code is written.
useWhen: starting a new project or large feature
the goal is clear but the steps are not
work needs to be split into verifiable stages

capabilities.name: Root-Cause Debugging
capabilities.summary: Requires evidence and a written diagnosis before any fix is attempted, preventing symptom-patching.
useWhen: a bug's cause is not yet proven
a fix was already tried and failed
behavior differs between environments
doNotUseWhen: the fix is a known one-line correction with an obvious cause

capabilities.name: Verification Before Completion
capabilities.summary: Requires tests, checks, and explicit validation output before any task may be declared done.
useWhen: completing any feature or fix
the agent tends to claim success without proof
regressions have slipped through before

capabilities.name: Frontend Design Skill
capabilities.summary: Guides an agent to produce distinctive, production-grade frontend UI instead of generic-looking pages.
useWhen: building or restyling web UI
the project needs polished visual design without a designer
doNotUseWhen: the project has no user interface

capabilities.name: Webapp Testing Skill
capabilities.summary: Structured approach for testing web applications end-to-end, including browser-driven verification of changes.
useWhen: verifying web app changes actually work in a browser
setting up an end-to-end testing habit for an agent
doNotUseWhen: the project is a pure library or CLI with no web surface

capabilities.name: Filesystem MCP
capabilities.summary: Official reference MCP server for reading, writing, and searching files within allowed directories.
useWhen: the agent needs controlled file access outside its default sandbox
batch file operations across a directory tree
doNotUseWhen: the coding agent already has sufficient built-in file tools

capabilities.name: Knowledge Graph Memory MCP
capabilities.summary: Official reference MCP server providing a local knowledge-graph memory the agent can read and write across a session.
useWhen: the agent needs lightweight structured memory without external services
doNotUseWhen: Supermemory or another dedicated memory layer is already integrated

capabilities.name: Sequential Thinking MCP
capabilities.summary: Official reference MCP server that structures complex problem-solving into explicit revisable thought sequences.
useWhen: multi-step reasoning tasks where the agent benefits from explicit planning structure
doNotUseWhen: simple direct tasks where extra reasoning steps add noise

capabilities.name: GitHub MCP
capabilities.summary: GitHub's official MCP server for repositories, issues, pull requests, and Actions via the GitHub API.
useWhen: the workflow involves managing issues, PRs, or repo automation
the agent should read CI results or review threads
doNotUseWhen: the project is not hosted on GitHub
no remote repository interaction is needed

capabilities.name: Playwright MCP
capabilities.summary: Microsoft's official MCP server driving a real browser via Playwright accessibility snapshots for testing and debugging web apps.
useWhen: debugging or end-to-end testing web applications
the agent must see and interact with rendered pages
doNotUseWhen: the project has no browser component

capabilities.name: Context7 Docs MCP
capabilities.summary: Fetches current, version-specific library documentation into the agent's context via the Context7 cloud service.
useWhen: the agent hallucinates outdated APIs for fast-moving libraries
working with frameworks whose docs changed after the model's cutoff
doNotUseWhen: the project must avoid sending queries to third-party cloud services

capabilities.name: Exa Web Search MCP
capabilities.summary: AI-native web search for agents via the Exa cloud API, returning semantic search results and page contents.
useWhen: the agent needs live web research or current information
doNotUseWhen: the project forbids sending queries to cloud services

capabilities.name: Firecrawl Scraping MCP
capabilities.summary: Web scraping and crawling for agents via the Firecrawl cloud API, turning websites into clean structured content.
useWhen: the project ingests content from external websites
structured extraction from many pages is needed
doNotUseWhen: the project forbids cloud processing of fetched content

capabilities.name: Supabase MCP
capabilities.summary: Manages Supabase projects from an agent: querying the database, applying schema changes, and inspecting configuration.
useWhen: the project uses Supabase for its database or backend
doNotUseWhen: the project has no Supabase dependency
database credentials must not be exposed to agent tooling

capabilities.name: PostgreSQL MCP (reference, archived)
capabilities.summary: Archived reference MCP server for read-only PostgreSQL access. Kept in the catalog as a deprecated example; prefer maintained alternatives.
useWhen: never for new projects; retained for provenance
doNotUseWhen: any new integration — the reference server was archived upstream
